subject: Swift BAT trigger 1500148: A solar flare
body:
P. A. Evans (U Leicester), C. Gronwall (PSU), R. Gupta (NASA GSFC),
A. Y. Lien (U Tampa) and K. L. Page (U Leicester) report on behalf of
the Neil Gehrels Swift Observatory Team:

BAT trigger 1500148 is not a GRB, but was caused by a solar flare.

Swift's automatic slews are currently disabled, so there will be no XRT or UVOT data for this trigger.
